requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence — Liberia Standards Authority / LERC / Project Specifications
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全证据——利比里亚标准局 / LERC / 项目规格
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全證據——賴比瑞亞標準局 / LERC / 項目規格

summary.en: Liberia has an emerging standards and electricity-regulatory framework rather than a widely published, inverter-specific national type-approval rule. Recent Ministry of Commerce and Industry pages identify the Liberia Standards Authority (LiSA) as developing, adopting, and harmonising national standards and providing conformity assessment services; the older NSL naming should be confirmed with Liberia authorities for the specific import route. For PV inverters, IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 safety type-test evidence is the practical project baseline used by utilities, donors, EPCs, and lenders. Where a grid-tied project also needs LERC licensing or LEC connection review, safety evidence should be tied to the exact model, firmware family, enclosure rating, and tropical operating conditions.
summary.zh: 利比里亚的标准和电力监管框架仍在发展中，而不是已公开形成专门针对逆变器的全国型式批准规则。近期利比里亚商务与工业部网页将Liberia Standards Authority（LiSA）列为负责制定、采用和协调国家标准并提供合格评定服务的机构；较早的NSL名称应就具体进口路径向利比里亚主管机构确认。对光伏逆变器而言，IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2安全型式试验证据是公用事业、捐助方、EPC和贷款方通常采用的项目基准。若并网项目还需要LERC许可或LEC接入审查，安全证据应覆盖具体型号、固件系列、外壳防护等级和热带运行条件。
summary.zht: 賴比瑞亞的標準和電力監管框架仍在發展中，而不是已公開形成專門針對逆變器的全國型式批准規則。近期賴比瑞亞商務與工業部網頁將Liberia Standards Authority（LiSA）列為負責制定、採用和協調國家標準並提供合格評定服務的機構；較早的NSL名稱應就具體進口路徑向賴比瑞亞主管機構確認。對光伏逆變器而言，IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2安全型式試驗證據是公用事業、捐助方、EPC和貸款方通常採用的項目基準。若併網項目還需要LERC許可或LEC接入審查，安全證據應覆蓋具體型號、韌體系列、外殼防護等級和熱帶運行條件。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
Liberia Standards Authority (LiSA) / NSL naming and conformity-assessment scope — confirm current competent authority before import
Liberia Electricity Regulatory Commission (LERC) licensing and technical regulation context where the PV system is connected to a regulated electricity activity

summary.en: China-side safety evidence commonly includes GB/T 37408-2019 or GB/T 37408-2021 documentation, voluntary CQC/CGC certification, and CNAS laboratory reports for the Chinese inverter model. These documents help show domestic quality control but do not automatically substitute for IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence in Liberia-facing utility, donor, or lender submissions. Chinese safety reports also need review for enclosure rating, creepage and clearance assumptions, surge category, humidity, corrosion, and temperature derating because Liberia's coastal tropical environment can be more severe than the assumptions used for a China domestic installation.
summary.zh: 中国侧安全证据通常包括GB/T 37408-2019或GB/T 37408-2021文件、自愿性CQC/CGC认证以及中国CNAS实验室针对该逆变器型号的报告。这些文件可说明国内质量控制，但不能在面向利比里亚公用事业、捐助方或贷款方提交时自动替代IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证据。中国安全报告还需审查外壳防护等级、爬电距离和电气间隙假设、浪涌类别、湿度、腐蚀和温度降额，因为利比里亚沿海热带环境可能严于中国国内安装假设。
summary.zht: 中國側安全證據通常包括GB/T 37408-2019或GB/T 37408-2021文件、自願性CQC/CGC認證以及中國CNAS實驗室針對該逆變器型號的報告。這些文件可說明國內品質控制，但不能在面向賴比瑞亞公用事業、捐助方或貸款方提交時自動替代IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證據。中國安全報告還需審查外殼防護等級、爬電距離和電氣間隙假設、浪湧類別、濕度、腐蝕和溫度降額，因為賴比瑞亞沿海熱帶環境可能嚴於中國國內安裝假設。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2019 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (legacy China documentation still seen in exporter files)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 37408 safety documentation should be treated as supporting evidence only. For Liberia projects, exporters should prepare IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test certificates or reports from an ILAC-recognised laboratory for the exact model or model family; confirm whether LiSA/NSL requires product conformity assessment at import; and confirm whether LERC, LEC, a micro-utility, or a donor project owner requires additional safety documentation. Include tropical humidity, corrosion exposure, surge protection, IP rating, and thermal derating evidence in the technical file.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 37408安全文件应仅作为辅助证据。面向利比里亚项目，出口商应准备来自ILAC认可实验室、覆盖具体型号或型号系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证书或报告；确认LiSA/NSL在进口环节是否要求产品合格评定；并确认LERC、LEC、微型公用事业运营方或捐助方项目业主是否要求额外安全文件。技术文件中应包含热带湿度、腐蚀暴露、浪涌保护、IP等级和热降额证据。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 37408安全文件應僅作為輔助證據。面向賴比瑞亞項目，出口商應準備來自ILAC認可實驗室、覆蓋具體型號或型號系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證書或報告；確認LiSA/NSL在進口環節是否要求產品合格評定；並確認LERC、LEC、微型公用事業運營方或捐助方項目業主是否要求額外安全文件。技術文件中應包含熱帶濕度、腐蝕暴露、浪湧保護、IP等級和熱降額證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where required by LiSA/NSL conformity assessment, LERC licensing, LEC connection review, project owner procurement, donor specifications, or lender technical due diligence; otherwise best-practice safety evidence for market acceptance
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary — GB/T 37408 and NB/T 32004 evidence supports China domestic certification or procurement but does not automatically transfer to Liberia

source.publisher: Liberia Ministry of Commerce & Industry / Liberia Standards Authority (LiSA)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not rely on China GB/T 37408 safety paperwork alone for Liberia PV inverter supply. Build an IEC 62109-1/-2 evidence file, confirm whether the competent standards body is LiSA or an NSL legacy route for the shipment, and verify any LERC, LEC, donor, or lender safety-document requirements before procurement or installation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向利比里亚供应光伏逆变器时，不应仅依赖中国GB/T 37408安全文件。应建立IEC 62109-1/-2证据包，确认该批货物适用的主管标准机构是LiSA还是NSL历史路径，并在采购或安装前核实LERC、LEC、捐助方或贷款方的安全文件要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向賴比瑞亞供應光伏逆變器時，不應僅依賴中國GB/T 37408安全文件。應建立IEC 62109-1/-2證據包，確認該批貨物適用的主管標準機構是LiSA還是NSL歷史路徑，並在採購或安裝前核實LERC、LEC、捐助方或貸款方的安全文件要求。
